settings.text: Curious visitors do not need a chemistry lecture first. They need to understand why grass-fed tallow belongs on dry, sensitive, reactive skin.

settings.title: Grass-Fed
settings.text: Sourced from 100% grass-fed cattle so you get the full nutrient profile -- higher in vitamins A, D, E, and K than grain-fed alternatives.

settings.title: No Fillers
settings.text: Every formula is clean-label. If you can't pronounce it and we can't trace it to a farm, it's not in here.

settings.title: Absorbs Fast
settings.text: Tallow's fatty acid profile closely matches your skin's natural sebum, so it absorbs without sitting on top or leaving a greasy layer.

settings.title: Face & Body
settings.text: Gentle enough for the most sensitive facial skin. Effective enough for your driest patches, cracked heels, and winter-damaged hands.

settings.title: Family Farm
settings.text: Made in small batches on the Mason family farm in Idaho. Not outsourced, not mass-produced, not scaled beyond the point where quality is controlled.

settings.title: Long-Lasting
settings.text: One jar goes further than most conventional moisturizers. A little goes a long way because tallow is concentrated nutrition, not diluted water-based formula.

settings.title: Clean Label
settings.text: No parabens, no phthalates, no synthetic fragrances, no petroleum derivatives. What you see on the label is everything that's in the jar.

settings.title: 4.9 Stars
settings.text: Hundreds of verified reviews from real customers with real skin conditions -- eczema, psoriasis, rosacea, dry skin, sensitive skin -- who switched and stayed.

settings.title: Your skin is made to work with tallow.
settings.text:
The fat composition of grass-fed beef tallow is remarkably similar to the fat composition of human skin. That's not a coincidence -- it's why tallow has been used in skincare for thousands of years across cultures with no access to synthetic alternatives.

  • Contains oleic acid, the same omega-9 fatty acid found in your skin's own fat
  • Rich in stearic acid, which supports the skin barrier and locks in moisture
  • High in fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, and K
  • No water content means no need for the preservatives that irritate sensitive skin

If synthetic moisturizers have always felt like they were working against your skin instead of with it, that's not your skin being difficult -- it's your skin being correct.

settings.title: The Science of Lipid Compatibility
settings.text: Tallow is lipid-rich skincare. Its fatty acid profile helps it behave more like the oils your skin naturally produces, which is why it can feel more compatible than water-based formulas.

settings.title: Why Grass-Fed Tallow Has More Nutrients
settings.text: Grass-fed sourcing supports a stronger nutrient profile, including fat-soluble vitamins that are naturally present in the rendered tallow used in our balm.
